title: Less Chat, More Answer: Site AI Chatbots Need to Get to the Point
description: NN/g research reveals users expect concise, scannable answers from AI chatbots, not conversational banter. Applies evidence-based guidelines for designing AI interfaces that respect user intent and cognitive load.

title: Your AI agent can read your codebase. It doesn't know your product.
description: A practical guide on bridging the gap between AI coding agents and actual product design by feeding them brand guidelines, visual patterns, and design language. Essential reading for teams implementing AI-assisted development workflows and maintaining design consistency.

title: Haptics: how to build a consistent cross-platform solution and align code with Figma
description: A technical deep-dive on standardizing haptic feedback across iOS, Android, and web while syncing with Figma components. Valuable for design systems teams looking to implement nuanced tactile experiences at scale.

title: Autopilot, agentic AI, and the dangers of imperfect metaphors
description: A critical examination of how misleading language around agentic AI ('autopilot,' 'intelligence') obscures mathematical reality and sets dangerous user expectations. Essential for designers communicating AI capabilities responsibly.

title: Boost Design Autonomy with an Information Pipeline
description: A four-step framework for design leaders to build organizational influence by systematically closing information gaps. Practical for product designers navigating complex orgs and strengthening their role in product decisions.

title: I watched the manosphere documentary; here is how design is making things worse.
description: A thought-provoking examination of how design choices inadvertently amplify harmful content and radicalization pathways. Critical perspective on ethical design responsibility and designing against bad-faith actors.

title: Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
source: Product Hunt — The best new products, every day
description: Anthropic's new AI design tool enables designers to create prototypes, slides, and one-pagers through natural conversation. A significant product launch that reshapes how designers interact with creation tools and signals the evolution of AI-assisted design.

title: Folder instructions — Instructions for system-level AI
description: An innovative concept converting passive file storage into active AI-aware systems that organize and evolve based on user intent. Forward-thinking exploration of how to design human-AI collaboration at the OS level.
